findings.description: PDF page-footer content (agency address and phone number) is inserted mid-body in the HTML, between the table of contents and Section I, breaking reading flow.
findings.evidence: The HTML places a <footer> block containing 'State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Waste Management / 1646 Mail Service Center | 217 West Jones Street | Raleigh, 27699-1646 / 919 707 8200' between the <nav> (TOC) and the <h2 id="history-background"> heading. In the PDF this is a page-bottom footer on page 1. Per instructions, even a single agency-address-and-phone block dropped between body paragraphs is a defect.

findings.description: The handwritten signature of Elizabeth S. Werner and the accompanying digital signature stamp (with signer details and date) visible on PDF page 1 are missing from the HTML. No corresponding tag exists.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows a handwritten signature and a digital signature box reading 'Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner, DN: cn=Elizabeth S Werner, o=DWM-Solid Waste, ou=NCDENR, email=elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov, c=US, Date: 2016.04.28 09:56:21 -04'00''. The HTML has no tag or text for either the signature or the digital stamp.
